title: Nutty Dense Saudian Spinach Stir-fry
description: A savory dish featuring tender spinach, nuts, and aromatic spices to satisfy a midnight craving, sugar-free friendly for those watching their intake.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons sunflower oil or vegan alternative
Juice of 1/2 lemon or lime
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of acidity and brightness

instructions: Heat the oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped nuts and sauté until fragrant and lightly toasted, about 3-5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add spinach leaves to the skillet, tossing gently to wilt them quickly. Cover with a lid if available to speed up cooking.
Drizzle lemon juice over the mixture to brighten its flavors.
Sprinkle cumin powder over the top of the spinach mixture and stir through evenly.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
